description_long: This object consists of three swords of varying lengths, each featuring a straight, double-edged blade with a pointed tip. The blades are metallic, exhibiting a dark, slightly reflective surface, and are aligned parallel to each other. Each sword has a simple, straight crossguard and a rectangular pommel, with the handles appearing to be solid and unadorned. The handles are short relative to the blade length, suggesting a one-handed grip. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or decorative features. The set appears robust and functional, suitable for practical use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A set of three straight, double-edged swords with dark metallic blades, simple crossguards, and rectangular pommels, designed for practical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and alignment of the three swords, highlighting their varying blade lengths and uniform handle design.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the width of the blades, the crossguards, and the rectangular pommels, with the handles facing forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the straightness and sharpness of the blades, as well as the consistent handle structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of the handles and the alignment of the crossguards, with the blades tapering away from the viewer.
